column2: Increases holder's chance to land crits by 10%
When damaged, swaps places with the attacker.
Lost health is distributed as healing for nearby allies.
When fatal damage is taken, sacrifice one random perk (can include this one).
On death, grants a copy of all perks except this one to nearby allies.
Holder will drop diamond nuggets instead of gold nuggets on death.
Creates a damp aura around the holder.
Holder is consumed by rage and grows stronger with every kill.
Holder releases an all-consuming blackhole on death.
